description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses ruby:3.3-alpine as the global image and a custom $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest image (pull_policy always) for the majority of jobs, with a docker:24.0.9-dind service only for the build:image job. Define four stages—validate, renovate_bot, test, and build—where most jobs (active_context, annotate, auto_build, auto_deploy, batched_background_migrations, broadcast, canary, database, deploy, deploycmd, explain, feature, gitaly, graph, helm, help, hotpatch, member, migrations, mirror, namespace, orchestrator, post_deploy_migrations, production_checks, publish, quality, query, release, rollback, search_migrations, user, zoekt) run in the default validate stage, execute the script "cd /app && bundle exec ruby /app/bin/chatops $CI_JOB_NAME", are tagged with "chatops", set GIT_STRATEGY and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to none, and are triggered only when $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "chat" (otherwise never). Add two test jobs—rspec and rubocop—in the test stage that share a before_script installing build‑base, postgresql‑dev, and bundler, cache the vendor/ruby directory, use a postgres:latest service, set coverage and database environment variables, and run respectively "bundle exec rake coverage" and "bundle exec rubocop". Add a build:image job in the build stage that uses the docker:24.0.9‑git image, runs "./bin/docker \"${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest\"", and requires the docker:24.0.9‑dind service, with rules to run on scheduled pipelines or pushes to the default branch. Apply a global retry policy of up to two attempts on runner, scheduler, stale schedule, unmet prerequisites, and timeout failures, and include the external renovate-bot.yml for the renovate_bot stage.
